overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character carrying heavy cargo wading through a river and traversing the shoreline in a mountainous wilderness during golden hour. The character transitions from water to rocky terrain to grassy plains with a distinctive arch structure visible in the distant landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river edge with rocky bank

events.description: character climbs out of river water onto dry rocky shoreline

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water and climbing onto the rocky riverbank with heavy cargo

entered.detail: shallow river water with visible current and reflections
light-colored rocky shoreline with uneven surfaces
distant mountain peaks with rocky cliff faces

segments.scene_description: The character wades through shallow river water and climbs onto the rocky shore. The camera follows from behind as the character emerges from the water onto light-colored rocks with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverside path with sparse vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky path beside the river

entered.detail: sparse dry vegetation and small shrubs along the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along the rocky riverside path with sparse dry bushes appearing on the right. The river remains visible in the distance to the left while the character moves steadily forward along the terrain.

events.description: terrain transitions from rocky shore to tall grass field
large arch structure becomes visible on the distant horizon

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass with the river visible to the left

entered.detail: tall golden grass covering the ground densely
large curved arch bridge structure visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide grassy field with tall golden vegetation. A distinctive large arch structure becomes visible on the horizon in the distance as the character continues walking through the grass.

events.description: returns to rocky shoreline from grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky beach with the river close on the left side

entered.detail: rocky shoreline along the river edge

segments.scene_description: Returning to the rocky shoreline, the river water comes back into close view on the left. The distant arch structure remains visible to the right as the character walks along the rocky beach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shallow river crossing into a wide, golden wilderness. It begins with the character wading through river water and climbing onto a light-colored rocky shore with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the character moves steadily forward, the terrain shifts from the rocky riverside path and sparse dry bushes into an expansive field of tall golden vegetation. The scene then opens further to reveal a distinctive large arch structure on the horizon before the path turns back toward the rocky shoreline. Finally, the river water returns into close view on the left while the distant arch remains visible to the right as the character traverses the beach.
